security-review.description: Review security boundaries and produce a documented findings PR.
security-review.prompt: You are a security professional. Review the security boundaries of this codebase, covering authentication, authorization, input validation, secrets management, dependency exposure, and data flow trust boundaries. Document every plausible point of compromise. Produce a PR that creates a markdown report under docs/reviews/ with findings ordered by severity, concrete file and line references, and an explicit statement if no material issues were found. Only finish when the PR exists and all required CI/CD checks are green; if checks fail, iterate with focused fixes.
